blocks.text: Southern Hills Hospital and Medical Center (COCSNV)
* ALL edits or amendments must be made on the electronic/computer
ACETAMINOPHEN ER (TYLENOL 8 HR ARTHRITIS PAIN) 650 MG TABLET.ER
Start taking the following new medications:
AMOXICILLIN/POTASSIUM CLAV (AUGMENTIN 875 MG-125 MG) 875 MG-125 MG TAB
ENT: normal ear left, normal ear right, normal nose
Respiratory: decreased breath sounds, symmetric expansion, no distress
Neuro/CNS: alert, oriented X 3, normal speech
Discharge to: Home Health wPlan of Care
Additional Discharge Routines: PCP Follow-Up, Consultant Follow-Up
Notify PCP of these S/S: Chest Pain, Shortness of breath, Temp. 101 or greater
PCP follow up timeframe: In 1-2 weeks
Consult follow up timeframe: In 1-2 weeks
Patient was advised to return to Emergency Department if there are recurrent symptoms,
worsening of symptoms, or any other acute medical issue.
